spaces.name: Sales Playbook
spaces.description: Sales process, qualification, pricing and negotiation guidelines

articles.title: Customer Qualification
articles.body: This directory contains frameworks and criteria for identifying and qualifying potential customers before investing significant sales effort.

children.title: Ideal Customer Profile
children.body:
Our ideal customer is a small-to-medium electrical contractor, facility manager, or building developer operating in Poland or the broader CEE region. They typically manage recurring procurement of electrical components — circuit protection, automation accessories, lighting, and time-control devices — and place orders in the range of 5 000–100 000 PLN per quarter.

**Company profile:**
- Employees: 5–200
- Annual revenue: 2M–50M PLN
- Industries: construction, facility management, industrial maintenance, smart-building integration
- Buying role: technical director, procurement manager, or owner-operator who personally signs off on supplier agreements

**Pain points we solve:**
Our customers struggle with inconsistent lead times from distributors, difficulty comparing products across brands (Schneider, ABB, ORNO, OSPEL, LEGRAND), and the time cost of assembling offer documentation for their own clients. They need a reliable supplier that can quickly propose the right SKU for a given specification and produce a professional offer within the same business day.

**Positive buying signals:**
The customer references a specific project (construction site, building renovation, industrial plant upgrade), asks about CE/RoHS compliance by name, or requests volume pricing — all of these indicate an active, near-term purchase intent rather than exploratory browsing.

**Disqualifiers:**
End consumers purchasing single units for home DIY, customers requiring delivery outside Poland with no VAT registration, or accounts with outstanding invoices older than 60 days should be flagged and escalated before any offer is issued.

children.title: Discovery Call Framework
children.body:
A discovery call should be completed within 20–30 minutes and structured around four goal areas: understanding the project context, identifying the decision-maker, qualifying budget and timeline, and uncovering technical requirements.

**Opening (2 min):**
Confirm who you are speaking with and their role. Ask openly: "Can you tell me a bit about the project you're working on?" Let the customer describe in their own words before asking targeted questions.

**Project & technical context (10 min):**
- What type of installation is this? (new build, renovation, industrial, residential)
- What category of products are needed? (automation, lighting control, circuit protection, time switching)
- Are there specific brand preferences or approval lists on the project?
- What voltage and current ratings are required? Any IP or mounting constraints?
- Are CE/RoHS certifications mandatory for this contract?

**Commercial context (5 min):**
- What is the approximate budget for this line of components?
- Is this a one-off purchase or part of an ongoing supply agreement?
- When does the project start, and when do components need to be on-site?
- Who else is involved in the purchasing decision?

**Next steps (3 min):**
Agree on a concrete next action — usually sending a draft offer within one business day. Confirm the preferred format (PDF via email, or through the customer portal). Log all technical requirements in the CRM before the call ends, while details are fresh.

articles.title: Offer & Pricing
articles.body: Pricing guidelines, discount thresholds, and negotiation tactics for structuring competitive offers.

children.title: Pricing Tiers & Discount Policy
children.body:
All list prices are maintained in the product catalog at gross PLN including 23% VAT. Net prices are derived automatically. The following discount tiers apply to single-order value and require no additional approval unless stated otherwise.

**Standard discount tiers (order value net):**
| Order value | Max discount | Approval required |
|-------------|-------------|-------------------|
| < 2 000 PLN | 5% | None |
| 2 000–9 999 PLN | 10% | None |
| 10 000–29 999 PLN | 15% | Sales Lead sign-off |
| 30 000–99 999 PLN | 20% | Sales Lead + Finance |
| ≥ 100 000 PLN | Negotiated | Director approval |

**Volume framework agreements:**
Customers who commit to a quarterly minimum (≥ 15 000 PLN net) may be offered a standing discount of up to 12% without per-order approval, provided the framework agreement is in place and Finance has approved the credit limit. Framework agreements are reviewed every six months.

**Brand-specific notes:**
Schneider Electric and ABB carry higher margin floors than domestic brands (ORNO, OSPEL, ZAMEL). Discounting Schneider and ABB beyond 8% on a single order requires explicit approval from the Product Manager, even if the order total is below the standard threshold. LEGRAND and FINDER sit in the mid-tier; standard tiers apply.

**What to never discount:**
Express delivery surcharges, documentation fees (Declaration of Conformity copies, test certificates), and installation training services are non-negotiable. These are cost-pass-through items.

children.title: Negotiation Guidelines
children.body:
Negotiation should be approached as a problem-solving conversation, not a concession game. Our goal is a deal where the customer feels they received fair value and we maintain healthy margins for sustainable service.

**Preparation:**
Before any negotiation, know the customer's order history (if returning), the margin on the specific SKUs involved, and whether there is a competitive offer on the table. Do not negotiate blind — if the customer mentions a competitor price, ask them to share the quote so you are comparing like-for-like (same specifications, certifications, delivery terms, and payment terms).

**Common customer tactics and responses:**

*"Your competitor is 12% cheaper."*
Ask to see the competitor quote. Often the competing product differs in IP rating, mounting type, or certificate coverage. If it is genuinely equivalent, acknowledge it, then shift to delivery speed, technical support, and our online offer system. If the gap is real and significant, escalate to Sales Lead before matching.

*"We always get 20% from our main supplier."*
Acknowledge the relationship, then reframe around total cost of ownership: faster delivery reduces their project delays, our documentation completeness reduces their compliance risk, and our online system saves their team's administrative hours. Offer to schedule a framework agreement review if volume justifies it.

*"We need to decide today."*
Do not let artificial urgency push you below margin floors. A one-business-day turnaround on a revised offer is reasonable and professional. Rushed decisions on large orders create rework.

**Concessions to offer (in order of preference):**
1. Faster delivery or reserved stock
2. Extended payment terms (30 → 45 days), subject to Finance approval
3. Bundled documentation (CE declarations, test reports) at no charge
4. Modest discount increment within tier, not crossing the next approval threshold

articles.title: Competitor Overview
articles.body:
Understanding the competitive landscape helps us position effectively and avoid losing deals on mismatched assumptions. The following covers our primary competitors in the Polish electrical components distribution market.

**ElektroHurt / Elektro-Hurt (multi-brand distributor):**
Large-volume distributor with strong presence in construction sector. Their key advantage is breadth of stock and nationwide warehouse network. Weakness: slow response times for custom offers, no AI-assisted specification matching, and quotations arrive as PDF tables with no interactivity. We win on speed and offer quality when the project has specific technical requirements.

**Manufacturer direct channels (Schneider, ABB, Legrand):**
Manufacturers increasingly push direct sales for large accounts (> 500k PLN annual spend). Their pricing is often sharper on their own brand but they cannot offer multi-brand consolidated offers. Position Solivio as the integrator: "One offer, one invoice, products from four manufacturers, delivery coordinated."

**Regional specialists (e.g. ORNO direct, ZAMEL direct):**
Polish manufacturers sometimes sell direct at near-wholesale prices. They compete primarily on price for their own product lines. Counter by highlighting CE certification breadth, mixed-brand compatibility, and the value of having a single supplier for the entire bill of materials.

**General e-commerce (Allegro B2B, Amazon Business):**
Increasingly relevant for small orders. They cannot provide technical consultation, proper documentation packs, or framework agreements. Customers who value these services self-select away from e-commerce. For pure price competition on commodity items, acknowledge limitations honestly rather than trying to match unit pricing.

articles.title: Escalation & Approvals
articles.body:
Certain situations require escalation before proceeding with an offer or order. Acting without the appropriate sign-off exposes the company to margin erosion, credit risk, or compliance issues.

**Situations requiring Sales Lead approval:**
- Discount request taking an order above the 15% threshold (see Pricing Tiers)
- Customer requesting payment terms beyond net-30 (net-45 or net-60)
- Offering a substitute product where the customer has specified a brand by name (technical approval needed)
- Any order from a customer with an open overdue invoice

**Situations requiring Finance approval:**
- Orders above 30 000 PLN net for a new customer (credit limit check)
- Framework agreements with standing discounts
- Proforma invoice requests where the customer's credit standing is unverified

**Situations requiring Director approval:**
- Orders above 100 000 PLN net
- Custom sourcing requests (products not in the standard catalog)
- Any exception to the standard 30-day offer validity period

**Response SLAs:**
Sales Lead responds within 4 business hours during working days. Finance credit checks complete within 1 business day. Director approvals are scheduled for the next working day. If an escalation is blocking a customer deadline, notify your Sales Lead immediately by phone — do not rely solely on email.

**How to escalate:**
Log the request in the CRM with the customer name, order value, discount level, and reason for exception. Tag your Sales Lead. Include the customer's quote or email as evidence. A clear, documented escalation resolves faster than a verbal request.

spaces.name: Product Catalog
spaces.description: Detailed product cards for home automation and electrical components

articles.title: Twilight Switches
articles.body: Photoelectric switches that automatically activate and deactivate connected loads based on ambient light levels. Used primarily for outdoor lighting control.

children.title: Schneider SE-0335Z — Twilight Switch 100 lx
children.body:
**SKU:** IV-012-00335
**Brand:** Schneider Electric | **Manufacturer:** Schneider Electric Polska Sp. z o.o. | **Country of origin:** France

## Description
The SE-0335Z is a surface-mount photoelectric twilight switch designed for automatic control of outdoor lighting. The built-in photocell measures ambient light and switches the connected load on at dusk and off at dawn. The sensitivity threshold is field-adjustable from 2 to 100 lx, making it suitable for both deep-twilight activation (streetlights, parking lots) and early-evening triggering (facade and garden lighting).

## Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Supply voltage | 230 V AC |
| Max. switching current | 6 A |
| Sensitivity range | 2–100 lx (adjustable) |
| IP rating | IP65 |
| Mounting | Surface (natynkowy) |
| DIN modules | 1 |
| Housing colour | Grey |
| Housing material | ABS plastic |
| Operating temperature | −25 °C to +50 °C |
| Certificates | CE, RoHS |

## Pricing
| | Net | Gross (23% VAT) |
|--|-----|------------------|
| List price | 112.98 PLN | 138.97 PLN |

## Typical Applications
- Outdoor wall lighting on residential and commercial buildings
- Garden and pathway lighting where manual switching is impractical
- Facade illumination with automatic dusk-to-dawn operation
- Car park perimeter lighting combined with motion sensors (series connection)

## Sales Notes
The IP65 rating and wide sensitivity range make this the go-to recommendation for most outdoor residential projects. The surface-mount housing installs without a junction box, reducing installation time. For DIN-rail panel installations, recommend the ABB AB-0277D instead. Pair with a time switch (ZAMEL or HAGER series) when the customer also needs a scheduled off-time during the night (e.g. lighting off at 23:00 regardless of dawn time).

children.title: OSPEL OP-0371X — Twilight Switch 2 lx DIN
children.body:
**SKU:** IV-012-00371
**Brand:** OSPEL | **Manufacturer:** OSPEL S.A. | **Country of origin:** Poland

## Description
The OP-0371X is a DIN-rail mounted twilight switch with an external photocell sensor, enabling the control unit to be installed inside a distribution board while the photocell is positioned externally for accurate light measurement. The sensitivity is adjustable down to 2 lx — the lowest threshold in the OSPEL range — making it ideal for installations where even very faint ambient light should keep the circuit open.

## Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Supply voltage | 230 V AC |
| Max. switching current | 6 A |
| Sensitivity range | 2–2 lx (fixed low threshold) |
| IP rating | IP65 (photocell head) |
| Mounting | DIN rail (szyna DIN) |
| DIN modules | 1 |
| Housing colour | Cream |
| Housing material | Polycarbonate |
| Operating temperature | −25 °C to +50 °C |
| Certificates | CE, RoHS, EMC |

## Pricing
| | Net | Gross (23% VAT) |
|--|-----|------------------|
| List price | 66.11 PLN | 81.32 PLN |

## Typical Applications
- Distribution board installations where the photocell cannot be mounted next to the control unit
- Industrial facilities requiring EMC-certified components
- Lighting control in switchboard panels for multi-tenant buildings

## Sales Notes
The additional EMC certificate (over and above CE/RoHS) makes this a solid choice for industrial and commercial projects with stricter EMC requirements. The low price point also makes it the default recommendation when budget is constrained and DIN-rail mounting is acceptable. For surface-mount preference, direct customers to the Schneider SE-0335Z.

children.title: ABB AB-0277D — Twilight Switch 16 A DIN
children.body:
**SKU:** IV-012-00277
**Brand:** ABB | **Manufacturer:** ABB Sp. z o.o. | **Country of origin:** Switzerland

## Description
The AB-0277D is ABB's high-current twilight switch for DIN-rail installation. At 16 A switching capacity it handles significantly larger loads than the standard 6 A units — suitable for controlling multiple luminaire circuits simultaneously or driving high-wattage LED floodlights and HID lamps directly without an intermediate relay.

## Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Supply voltage | 230 V AC |
| Max. switching current | 16 A |
| Sensitivity range | 2–10 lx (adjustable) |
| IP rating | IP44 |
| Mounting | DIN rail (szyna DIN) |
| Housing colour | Black |
| Housing material | Polycarbonate |
| Operating temperature | −20 °C to +50 °C |
| Certificates | CE, RoHS, EMC |

## Pricing
| | Net | Gross (23% VAT) |
|--|-----|------------------|
| List price | 115.90 PLN | 142.56 PLN |

## Typical Applications
- Commercial exterior lighting panels (car parks, warehouses, logistics centres)
- Direct control of LED floodlights up to 3 680 W at 230 V
- Industrial yard lighting requiring robust DIN-rail components
- Projects where the ABB brand is specified by the building designer or approval list

## Sales Notes
This is the correct recommendation when the customer's lighting load exceeds 6 A or when the switchboard design explicitly requires ABB components. The 16 A capacity eliminates the need for an intermediate contactor on most mid-size outdoor lighting circuits, simplifying the panel layout. Note the IP44 rating — the distribution board must provide the weatherproofing; the unit itself is not suitable for outdoor exposure.

articles.title: Acoustic Sensors
articles.body: Sound-activated switches that turn on lighting when a noise above a configurable threshold is detected. Common in stairwells, corridors, and basements.

children.title: OSPEL OP-0623H — Acoustic Sensor 80 dB
children.body:
**SKU:** IV-013-00623
**Brand:** OSPEL | **Manufacturer:** OSPEL S.A. | **Country of origin:** Poland

## Description
The OP-0623H is a flush-mount acoustic switch designed for stairwell and corridor lighting automation. It activates the connected load when ambient sound exceeds the configurable threshold (minimum 80 dB) and automatically switches off after an adjustable delay of up to 300 seconds. The flush mounting (podtynkowy) integrates cleanly into standard wall outlet boxes, making it indistinguishable from a conventional switch plate.

## Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Supply voltage | 230 V AC |
| Max. switching current | 6 A |
| Sound sensitivity | ≥ 80 dB (adjustable) |
| Switch-off delay | Up to 300 s (adjustable) |
| IP rating | IP20 |
| Mounting | Flush (podtynkowy) |
| DIN modules | 1 |
| Housing colour | Black |
| Housing material | Polycarbonate |
| Operating temperature | −10 °C to +40 °C |
| Certificates | CE, RoHS |

## Pricing
| | Net | Gross (23% VAT) |
|--|-----|------------------|
| List price | 60.01 PLN | 73.81 PLN |

## Typical Applications
- Stairwell lighting in residential apartment buildings
- Basement and utility corridor lighting
- Parking garage pedestrian walkways
- Any location where hands-free activation is required but motion sensors are impractical

## Sales Notes
The 300-second maximum delay is generous for stairwell use and suits buildings with many floors. The flush-mount format allows installation in standard 60 mm wall boxes alongside other OSPEL switch plates for a uniform aesthetic. This is our most affordable acoustic sensor, making it the default choice for large residential projects. For DIN-rail installation preference or EMC certification requirement, recommend the LEGRAND LG-0695R.

children.title: LEGRAND LG-0695R — Acoustic Sensor 70 dB DIN
children.body:
**SKU:** IV-013-00695
**Brand:** LEGRAND | **Manufacturer:** Legrand Polska Sp. z o.o. | **Country of origin:** France

## Description
The LG-0695R is LEGRAND's DIN-rail acoustic sensor, offering 70 dB minimum sensitivity (lower threshold than the OSPEL equivalent, meaning it responds to quieter sounds) and a 60-second maximum switch-off delay. The DIN mounting allows it to be integrated into the building's distribution board alongside other protective and control devices.

## Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Supply voltage | 230 V AC |
| Max. switching current | 6 A |
| Sound sensitivity | ≥ 70 dB (adjustable) |
| Switch-off delay | Up to 60 s (adjustable) |
| IP rating | IP44 |
| Mounting | DIN rail (szyna DIN) |
| DIN modules | 1 |
| Housing colour | Black |
| Housing material | PC + ABS |
| Operating temperature | −10 °C to +40 °C |
| Certificates | CE, RoHS |

## Pricing
| | Net | Gross (23% VAT) |
|--|-----|------------------|
| List price | 76.03 PLN | 93.52 PLN |

## Typical Applications
- Commercial buildings with centralised distribution boards
- Offices and commercial corridors where panel-based control is preferred
- Installations requiring the Legrand brand per design specification

## Sales Notes
The shorter maximum delay (60 s vs. 300 s for the OSPEL) is actually a selling point in commercial office environments where lights running long after someone passes is perceived as wasteful. The DIN mounting also means the acoustic sensor lives behind a locked panel, reducing the risk of tampering. Use this product when the customer's panel is already LEGRAND-specified.

children.title: ABB AB-0750C — Acoustic Sensor 70 dB Flush
children.body:
**SKU:** IV-013-00750
**Brand:** ABB | **Manufacturer:** ABB Sp. z o.o. | **Country of origin:** Switzerland

## Description
The AB-0750C is ABB's flush-mount acoustic switch with a 70 dB sensitivity threshold and a maximum 30-second switch-off delay. As the shortest delay in our acoustic sensor range, it is designed for applications where very brief lighting activation is sufficient — such as short corridors or utility closets — and where energy conservation is a priority.

## Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Supply voltage | 230 V AC |
| Max. switching current | 10 A |
| Sound sensitivity | ≥ 70 dB (adjustable) |
| Switch-off delay | Up to 30 s (adjustable) |
| IP rating | IP44 |
| Mounting | Flush (podtynkowy) |
| DIN modules | 1 |
| Housing colour | Grey |
| Housing material | Polycarbonate |
| Operating temperature | −10 °C to +40 °C |
| Certificates | CE, RoHS |

## Pricing
| | Net | Gross (23% VAT) |
|--|-----|------------------|
| List price | 70.64 PLN | 86.89 PLN |

## Typical Applications
- Short corridors, utility closets, meter rooms
- Installations with ABB brand specification requirement
- Higher-current applications (up to 10 A) in flush-mount format

## Sales Notes
The 10 A switching capacity (vs 6 A for the OSPEL and LEGRAND equivalents) means this unit can directly control slightly larger lighting loads without an intermediate relay. The ABB brand carries weight in commercial and industrial projects. Recommend this when the customer already has ABB distribution components and wants a consistent brand across the panel and in-wall devices.

articles.title: Thermostats
articles.body: Room thermostats and temperature controllers for heating systems, underfloor heating, and climate control applications.

children.title: ORNO OR-0797X — Room Thermostat LCD 10–30 °C
children.body:
**SKU:** IV-014-00797
**Brand:** ORNO | **Manufacturer:** ORNO Sp. z o.o. | **Country of origin:** Poland

## Description
The OR-0797X is a DIN-rail mounted room thermostat with an LCD display, designed to control underfloor heating systems, boilers, and fan-coil units. The 24 V supply voltage makes it compatible with low-voltage control circuits common in modern HVAC systems. The relay contacts rated at 16 A can directly switch most zone valves, contactors, and heating actuators without intermediate relays.

## Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Supply voltage | 24 V AC/DC |
| Contact rating | 16 A |
| Temperature range | 10–30 °C |
| Display | LCD |
| Mounting | DIN rail (szyna DIN) |
| DIN modules | 1 |
| Housing colour | Cream |
| Housing material | ABS plastic |
| Operating temperature | −10 °C to +50 °C |
| Certificates | CE, RoHS |

## Pricing
| | Net | Gross (23% VAT) |
|--|-----|------------------|
| List price | 112.36 PLN | 138.20 PLN |

## Typical Applications
- Underfloor heating zone control
- Boiler and heat pump on/off control
- Fan-coil unit temperature management in offices and hotels
- Panel-integrated temperature control where DIN mounting is preferred

## Sales Notes
The DIN-rail format makes this ideal for centralised heating control panels. The 24 V supply is a key differentiator — ensure the customer confirms their control circuit voltage before ordering. If they need 230 V supply, the Schneider SE-0840B is the correct alternative. ORNO thermostats are popular in the residential and light commercial segment due to reliable build quality at a competitive price.

children.title: Schneider SE-0840B — Temperature Controller LCD 5–35 °C
children.body:
**SKU:** IV-014-00840
**Brand:** Schneider Electric | **Manufacturer:** Schneider Electric Polska Sp. z o.o. | **Country of origin:** France

## Description
The SE-0840B is a surface-mount room thermostat with an LCD display, operating from 230 V mains. The broader temperature range (5–35 °C vs 10–30 °C for DIN-rail models) accommodates both heating and cooling control, making it a versatile option for mixed-climate zones. The surface-mount format with a clean white housing suits modern residential interiors.

## Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Supply voltage | 230 V AC |
| Contact rating | 16 A |
| Temperature range | 5–35 °C |
| Display | LCD |
| Mounting | Surface (natynkowy) |
| DIN modules | 2 |
| Housing colour | White |
| Housing material | PC + ABS |
| Operating temperature | −10 °C to +50 °C |
| Certificates | CE |

## Pricing
| | Net | Gross (23% VAT) |
|--|-----|------------------|
| List price | 173.50 PLN | 213.41 PLN |

## Typical Applications
- Residential underfloor heating control with visible wall-mount installation
- Small office and boutique hotel room temperature control
- Heat pump and air-conditioning unit control (cooling mode support)
- Installations where Schneider brand specification is required

## Sales Notes
This is the premium option in the thermostat range. The Schneider brand and white surface-mount housing justify the higher price in residential and hospitality applications where the device is visible to occupants. The 230 V supply eliminates the need for a separate 24 V transformer. Note that CE certification only (no RoHS) — confirm with the customer if RoHS compliance is a contract requirement; if so, recommend the ORNO OR-0797X or FINDER FN-0842B.

children.title: FINDER FN-0842B — DIN Thermostat 10–30 °C
children.body:
**SKU:** IV-014-00842
**Brand:** FINDER | **Manufacturer:** Finder S.p.A. | **Country of origin:** Italy

## Description
The FN-0842B is a compact DIN-rail thermostat from FINDER with no display — the setpoint is adjusted via a small potentiometer accessible on the front face. The 24 V supply and IP44 rating make it suitable for environments where a basic, robust thermostat is needed without the cost of a display unit. The black housing and polycarbonate material are well-suited to industrial switchboards.

## Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Supply voltage | 24 V AC/DC |
| Contact rating | 10 A |
| Temperature range | 10–30 °C |
| Display | None (potentiometer adjustment) |
| IP rating | IP44 |
| Mounting | DIN rail (szyna DIN) |
| Housing colour | Black |
| Housing material | ABS plastic |
| Operating temperature | −10 °C to +50 °C |
| Certificates | CE, RoHS, EMC |

## Pricing
| | Net | Gross (23% VAT) |
|--|-----|------------------|
| List price | 149.80 PLN | 184.25 PLN |

## Typical Applications
- Industrial and commercial plant heating control panels
- Server room and cabinet temperature management
- Installations requiring EMC certification alongside CE/RoHS
- Applications where display cost is unjustified and setpoint is rarely changed

## Sales Notes
The triple certification (CE, RoHS, EMC) is this product's main differentiator. For industrial and public-sector projects where all three certificates are mandatory, the FN-0842B is the correct recommendation. The 10 A contact rating is slightly lower than the ORNO and Schneider equivalents — confirm the load does not exceed 10 A before specifying. At 149.80 PLN net it sits between the ORNO and Schneider models; the price premium over ORNO is justified only when EMC certification is required.

articles.title: Water Leak Sensors
articles.body: Flood and leak detection devices for bathrooms, boiler rooms, laundry rooms, and any area at risk of water damage.

children.title: ORNO OR-1134K — Wi-Fi Leak Sensor IP65
children.body:
**SKU:** IV-015-01134
**Brand:** ORNO | **Manufacturer:** ORNO Sp. z o.o. | **Country of origin:** Poland

## Description
The OR-1134K is a wireless water leak detector with Wi-Fi connectivity, allowing it to send real-time alerts to a smartphone app when water is detected on the floor. Battery-powered with a CR2032 cell, it requires no wiring beyond sensor placement, making installation take minutes rather than hours. The IP65 rating ensures the sensor housing is protected against water ingress from above while detecting water pooling below.

## Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Supply voltage | 24 V DC (battery CR2032) |
| Max. current | 0.5 A |
| Connectivity | Wi-Fi |
| IP rating | IP65 |
| Mounting | Floor placement (podłogowy) |
| Housing colour | White |
| Housing material | Polycarbonate |
| Operating temperature | −10 °C to +50 °C |
| Certificates | CE, RoHS |

## Pricing
| | Net | Gross (23% VAT) |
|--|-----|------------------|
| List price | 53.74 PLN | 66.10 PLN |

## Typical Applications
- Under kitchen and bathroom sinks
- Boiler room and water heater alcoves
- Laundry rooms and washing machine positions
- Server room raised floor environments
- Property management systems requiring remote alerting

## Sales Notes
The Wi-Fi alerting capability is the key differentiator for residential and property management customers — they receive a push notification on their phone before a leak causes significant damage. At 53.74 PLN net, it is the most affordable sensor in the range and easy to position in a bill of materials as a low-cost insurance item. For customers needing an audible local alarm (not just a phone notification), recommend the ABB AB-1212E instead.

children.title: ABB AB-1212E — Acoustic Alarm Leak Sensor IP67
children.body:
**SKU:** IV-015-01212
**Brand:** ABB | **Manufacturer:** ABB Sp. z o.o. | **Country of origin:** Switzerland

## Description
The AB-1212E is ABB's leak detection sensor with a built-in acoustic alarm that sounds locally when water is detected. The IP67 rating — the highest in our flood sensor range — means the sensor can be temporarily submerged without damage, which is important in environments where flooding can be rapid and deep. The CR2032 battery provides extended standby life, and the grey polycarbonate housing is robust enough for industrial environments.

## Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Supply voltage | 24 V DC (battery CR2032) |
| Max. current | 0.5 A |
| Output type | Acoustic alarm |
| IP rating | IP67 |
| Mounting | Surface (natynkowy) |
| Housing colour | Grey |
| Housing material | PC + ABS |
| Operating temperature | −10 °C to +50 °C |
| Certificates | CE, RoHS |

## Pricing
| | Net | Gross (23% VAT) |
|--|-----|------------------|
| List price | 106.21 PLN | 130.64 PLN |

## Typical Applications
- Boiler rooms and plant rooms where local staff need immediate audible warning
- Basement server rooms and data closets
- Industrial machinery bases and beneath process equipment
- Commercial kitchens and food processing areas

## Sales Notes
The IP67 rating and ABB brand make this the preferred recommendation for industrial and commercial applications. The acoustic alarm is particularly valuable where no one is monitoring a phone app — the sound alerts nearby staff directly. At nearly double the price of the ORNO Wi-Fi sensor, position this where robustness and local alerting matter more than remote notification.

articles.title: Time Programmers
articles.body: Electromechanical and digital time switches for scheduled control of lighting, heating, machinery, and other electrical loads.

children.title: HAGER HG-1696D — Weekly Plug-in Timer 20 programmes
children.body:
**SKU:** IV-022-01696
**Brand:** HAGER | **Manufacturer:** Hager Polo Sp. z o.o. | **Country of origin:** Germany

## Description
The HG-1696D is a weekly plug-in time switch designed to fit any standard 230 V socket outlet. Up to 20 switching programmes can be set using the analogue dial, providing flexible daily and weekly schedules for any device with a standard mains plug — lamps, fans, water heaters, advertising displays, etc. The analogue tarpaulin-style display makes programme entry intuitive without a digital menu.

## Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Supply voltage | 230 V AC |
| Max. switching current | 16 A |
| Programme capacity | 20 |
| Schedule type | Weekly |
| Display | Analogue dial (tarcza) |
| IP rating | IP20 |
| Mounting | Plug-in (gniazdkowy) |
| Housing colour | Black |
| Housing material | ABS plastic |
| Operating temperature | 0 °C to +40 °C |
| Certificates | CE, RoHS, EMC |

## Pricing
| | Net | Gross (23% VAT) |
|--|-----|------------------|
| List price | 55.96 PLN | 68.83 PLN |

## Typical Applications
- Home and office lighting scheduled automation
- Shop window and display advertising illumination
- Water heater and boiler scheduling for off-peak tariffs
- Aquarium and greenhouse lighting with day/night simulation

## Sales Notes
HAGER's reputation for quality panel products extends to their plug-in accessories. The EMC certification alongside CE/RoHS is unusual in this product category and worth highlighting for commercial customers. At 55.96 PLN net with 20 programmes and a weekly schedule, this sits in the mid-range of plug-in timers. For customers needing only daily scheduling at the lowest price, recommend the ZAMEL ZM-1527B.

children.title: ZAMEL ZM-1527B — Daily Plug-in Timer 16 programmes
children.body:
**SKU:** IV-022-01527
**Brand:** ZAMEL | **Manufacturer:** ZAMEL Sp. z o.o. | **Country of origin:** Poland

## Description
The ZM-1527B is a compact daily-cycle plug-in timer with 16 programme slots and an analogue dial interface. As a Polish-manufactured product, it combines low list price with solid build quality. The IP44 rating is unusually high for a plug-in timer and means it can be used outdoors under a covered porch or in a damp utility environment — a meaningful differentiator at this price point.

## Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Supply voltage | 230 V AC |
| Max. switching current | 16 A |
| Programme capacity | 16 |
| Schedule type | Daily |
| Display | Analogue dial (tarcza) |
| IP rating | IP44 |
| Mounting | Plug-in (gniazdkowy) |
| Housing colour | Grey |
| Housing material | ABS plastic |
| Operating temperature | 0 °C to +40 °C |
| Certificates | CE, RoHS |

## Pricing
| | Net | Gross (23% VAT) |
|--|-----|------------------|
| List price | 29.41 PLN | 36.17 PLN |

## Typical Applications
- Budget-conscious residential lighting control
- Outdoor socket-connected garden lighting under covered areas (IP44)
- Small commercial premises with simple daily on/off lighting schedules

## Sales Notes
At 29.41 PLN net this is the lowest-price timer in our range that meets IP44 and 16 A specifications. For large residential projects or cost-sensitive public procurement where daily scheduling is sufficient, this is the default recommendation. The ZAMEL brand is widely recognised in Poland and does not require explanation to Polish contractors.

children.title: ORNO OR-1928E — Surface Weekly Timer IP44
children.body:
**SKU:** IV-023-01928
**Brand:** ORNO | **Manufacturer:** ORNO Sp. z o.o. | **Country of origin:** Poland

## Description
The OR-1928E is a surface-mount (natynkowy) weekly time switch in a robust IP44 housing, designed for permanent fixed installation rather than plug-in use. It supports 4 switching programmes per week and is intended for garages, workshops, warehouses, and outdoor-adjacent installations where a weatherproof enclosure is needed and a dedicated switched circuit exists.

## Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Supply voltage | 230 V AC |
| Max. switching current | 16 A |
| Programme capacity | 4 |
| Schedule type | Weekly |
| IP rating | IP44 |
| Mounting | Surface (natynkowy) |
| Housing colour | Black |
| Housing material | PC + ABS |
| Operating temperature | −20 °C to +50 °C |
| Certificates | CE, RoHS, EMC |

## Pricing
| | Net | Gross (23% VAT) |
|--|-----|------------------|
| List price | 94.16 PLN | 115.82 PLN |

## Typical Applications
- Garage and workshop lighting with scheduled on/off
- Outdoor security lighting on a fixed wall circuit
- Caravan site and allotment electricity supply scheduling
- Agricultural buildings — irrigation pump, feed conveyor, ventilation scheduling

## Sales Notes
The IP44 surface-mount format with EMC certification is the defining feature here. Customers replacing an old mechanical time clock in a garage or agricultural building will find this a direct drop-in with modern performance. The −20 °C lower temperature limit is also relevant for unheated outbuildings in Polish winters. Recommend alongside a twilight switch (in series) when the customer wants both dusk-triggered and time-limited control.

children.title: FINDER FN-1752P — Surface Weekly Timer IP54
children.body:
**SKU:** IV-023-01752
**Brand:** FINDER | **Manufacturer:** Finder S.p.A. | **Country of origin:** Italy

## Description
The FN-1752P is FINDER's premium surface-mount weekly time switch with IP54 protection — the highest ingress protection rating in our surface-mount timer range. The white polycarbonate housing and clean design suit it for visible installations in commercial and hospitality environments. Four weekly programmes provide sufficient flexibility for most scheduled lighting and HVAC control applications.

## Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Supply voltage | 230 V AC |
| Max. switching current | 10 A |
| Programme capacity | 4 |
| Schedule type | Weekly |
| IP rating | IP54 |
| Mounting | Surface (natynkowy) |
| Housing colour | White |
| Housing material | Polycarbonate |
| Operating temperature | −20 °C to +50 °C |
| Certificates | CE, RoHS |

## Pricing
| | Net | Gross (23% VAT) |
|--|-----|------------------|
| List price | 136.52 PLN | 167.92 PLN |

## Typical Applications
- Hotel and restaurant terrace lighting control
- Outdoor signage and facade lighting scheduled activation
- Commercial kitchen ventilation scheduling (IP54 handles steam and splashing)
- Installations requiring FINDER brand per project specification

## Sales Notes
The IP54 rating and premium FINDER branding justify the higher price in hospitality and commercial settings. Note the 10 A current limit — lower than the ORNO OR-1928E (16 A). Always confirm the customer's load before specifying; if the load exceeds 10 A, the ORNO unit is the correct choice. For industrial settings with EMC requirements, the ORNO OR-1928E (CE, RoHS, EMC) is preferable.
